title: The Fabulous Senorita
writer: Charles E. Roberts, Jack Townley, Charles R. Marion
actors: Estelita Rodriguez, Robert Clarke, Nestor Paiva
plot: In Cuba, businessman Jose Rodriguez finds himself in a dilemma when loan officer Senor Gonzales tells him that he will approve his loan only if Gonzales' son Estaban is permitted to marry his daughter Manuela. Jose reluctantly con...
